# USA Car Volts - LLMs.txt
# https://www.usacarvolts.com
# Professional Car Electrical Services Across the USA

## About
USA Car Volts is America's premier automotive electrical service provider, offering expert car electrical services including battery replacement, alternator repair, starter motor repair, car electrical diagnostics, EV charging station installation, and wiring harness repair. We serve Florida and California with ASE-certified technicians, same-day service, and warranty-backed repairs.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.usacarvolts.com
- Phone: 1-800-555-VOLT
- Email: info@usacarvolts.com

## Services
- Car Battery Replacement: https://www.usacarvolts.com/services/battery-replacement
- Alternator Repair & Replacement: https://www.usacarvolts.com/services/alternator-repair
- Starter Motor Repair: https://www.usacarvolts.com/services/starter-motor-repair
- Car Electrical Diagnostics: https://www.usacarvolts.com/services/car-electrical-diagnostics
- EV Charging Station Installation: https://www.usacarvolts.com/services/ev-charging-installation
- Wiring Harness Repair: https://www.usacarvolts.com/services/wiring-harness-repair

## Service Locations
- Florida: https://www.usacarvolts.com/locations/florida
  - Cities: Miami, Fort Lauderdale, West Palm Beach, Orlando, Tampa, St. Petersburg, Jacksonville, Tallahassee, Naples, Gainesville, Sarasota, Daytona Beach
- California: https://www.usacarvolts.com/locations/california
  - Cities: Los Angeles, San Francisco, San Diego, Sacramento, San Jose, Oakland, Fresno, Long Beach, Anaheim, Riverside, Bakersfield, Santa Barbara

## Key Facts
- Rating: 4.9 stars from 527+ reviews
- Certifications: ASE-Certified, BBB A+ Rating, AAA Recommended
- Warranty: Minimum 12-month/12,000-mile on all repairs
- Battery brands: Interstate, Optima, DieHard, ACDelco, Bosch
- Service type: In-shop and mobile service available
- Hours: Monday-Saturday 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
